inputs: qa notes 2026-07-23 — repro steps and frequency
browser devtools traces from the repro session
unresolved: whether the eventual fix listens to pageshow or opts out of bfcache — a change-blueprint question, not a diagnosis one
conclusion: H2 is the cause: Safari bfcache restores the pre-navigation DOM with pageshow.persisted=true and no popstate, so renderFromUrl never re-runs. H1 falsified (handler fires everywhere else), H3 falsified (pure core property-tested stable), H4 falsified (synchronous render, nothing to race). Fix direction — pageshow listener vs bfcache opt-out — is deliberately out of scope here.
